title: Mitochondrial dysfunction in Alzheimer's disease
source: D'Alessandro et al., Ageing Research Reviews, 2025

L2: Mitochondrial dysfunction is a key pathological mechanism in Alzheimer's disease progression
Review examines the relationship between mitochondrial impairment and neurodegeneration
L3: Comprehensive review of mitochondrial dysfunction as a central mechanism in Alzheimer's disease pathogenesis, covering oxidative stress, energy metabolism impairment, mitochondrial dynamics, and therapeutic targeting strategies
